also known as **Z Keralam** is an Indian [Malayalam language](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam") [general entertainment](/wiki/Entertainment "Entertainment") [pay television](/wiki/Pay_television "Pay television") channel owned by [Zee Entertainment Enterprises](/wiki/Zee_Entertainment_Enterprises "Zee Entertainment Enterprises").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The channel was launched on 26 November 2018 and it is ZEE's fifth channel in the southern region.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) The channel is headquartered in [Kochi](/wiki/Kochi "Kochi"), [Kerala](/wiki/Kerala "Kerala").[[3]](#cite_note-3)
["ZEEL launches new Malayalam GEC – Zee Keralam"](https://www.exchange4media.com/media-tv-news/zeel-launches-new-malayalam-gec-zee-keralam-92585.html). *Exchange4media*. 17 October 2018.
["Zee Keralam celebrates second anniversary, thanks viewers for the exciting two years"](https://www.indiantel

Television channel

**Zee Keralam** also known as **Z Keralam** is an Indian [Malayalam language](/wiki/Malayalam "Malayalam") [general entertainment](/wiki/Entertainment "Entertainment") [pay television](/wiki/Pay_television "Pay television") channel owned by [Zee Entertainment Enterprises](/wiki/Zee_Entertainment_Enterprises "Zee Entertainment Enterprises").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The channel was launched on 26 November 2018 and it is ZEE's fifth channel in the southern region.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2) The channel is headquartered in [Kochi](/wiki/Kochi "Kochi"), [Kerala](/wiki/Kerala "Kerala").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## History

Zee Keralam with its high definition (HD) variant, Zee Keralam HD was launched on 26 November 2018 and it is ZEE's fifth channel in the southern region.[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5) Zee Keralam was one of the top 5 channels according BARC rating within the first year of its launch.[[2]](#cite_note-:0-2)[[6]](#cite_note-6)
